overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a sunny urban walk through a Los Santos neighborhood. The camera follows a pedestrian route from a railroad crossing corner, across commercial streets with passing vehicles, along sidewalks past retail buildings, and finally approaching a metro train station.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with railroad crossing and commercial intersection

events.description: begins crossing the street from sidewalk to intersection
dark sedan and SUV pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking forward from the corner and stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal shirt walking ahead of camera across the street

entered.detail: X-shaped railroad crossing sign on white pole
red octagonal stop sign below railroad sign
wide asphalt intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic lights
low-rise commercial structures with billboards and signage

segments.scene_description: Starting at a sunny street corner marked by a railroad crossing sign, the camera follows a pedestrian in a teal shirt across a wide commercial intersection. Vehicles pass through the crossing as the camera moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with jewelry store and passing traffic

events.description: turns left at the intersection to follow the road parallel to traffic
white and yellow taco truck passes closely from left to right

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing along the roadside, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: taco truck with 'Choose Sides' branding driving past the camera

entered.detail: large yellow and black sign with diamond logo reading 'Discount Jewels'
white food truck with yellow accents and red text advertising tacos and burgers

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the camera turns left along a commercial street lined with palm trees. A prominent 'Discount Jewels' sign marks the corner while a taco truck passes closely by. The scene transitions from the open intersection to a roadside view with utility poles and distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to mega mall and metro line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk past retail storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in hat standing near the Mega Mall fence looking at phone

entered.detail: large turquoise industrial building with 'MEGA MALL' painted in white letters
curved metal and glass canopy structure of the metro station

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a sidewalk next to the turquoise Mega Mall building, passing occasional pedestrians. In the distance, the curved canopy of a metro station becomes increasingly prominent as the camera approaches, with the downtown skyline visible behind palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train station platform and access ramp

events.description: arrives at the train station crosswalk and begins ascending the platform ramp
red and white metro train visible at the station platform

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp into the metro station platform area, approaching the train tracks

entered.detail: red and white metro train stopped at the platform
concrete ramp with glass railings leading up to the station platform
metal rails and gravel bed of the metro line

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street and enters the metro station area, walking up a concrete ramp with glass railings. A red and white train is visible at the platform under the curved station canopy, marking the transition from street level to the elevated transit infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny urban intersection through a commercial district and into an elevated transit hub. It begins at a street corner marked by a railroad crossing sign, following a pedestrian in a teal shirt across a wide asphalt crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection. As the camera turns left, the open crossing shifts into a roadside view lined with palm trees and utility poles, passing a Discount Jewels sign and a moving taco truck. The scene then proceeds along a sidewalk beside the turquoise Mega Mall building, with the downtown skyline and the curved canopy of a metro station gradually becoming more prominent in the distance. Finally, the camera crosses the street and ascends a concrete ramp with glass railings, moving from the street level to the station platform where a red and white train awaits.
